prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document does not apply to Scotland as it exclusively covers data related to students funded by Student Finance England, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Student funding in Scotland is managed by the Student Awards Agency Scotland (SAAS), and thus, Scottish students and their withdrawal notifications are not included in this publication.
